# Fury Node SDK for OpenTelemetry Configuration (OTel)

## Usage

Check out our documentation for usage information:

- [SDK Documentation](https://furydocs.io/node-melitk-otel/latest/guide/#/) - Complete guide for this SDK
- [Observability Documentation](https://furydocs.io/o11y-docs/latest/guide/#/) - General Observability services documentation

Package `otel` provides the client for an out-of-the-box instrumentation of OpenTelemetry service. Check out
our [changelog](./CHANGELOG.md) for information about the latest bug fixes, updates, and features added to the SDK.

- [Help and Support](#Help-and-Support)
- [Migration Guide](#Migration-Guide)
- [Contributing](#Contributing)

## :warning: Nordic 9 Warning

> [!WARNING]
>
> **The current version of master is only compatible with Nordic 9. If you are using Nordic 8, please use the previous version of the repository.**
>
> Use [v1.x.x](https://github.com/melisource/fury_node-melitk-otel/tree/v1.x.x) for modules compatible with Nordic 8.

## Getting Started

Install the package:

```bash
npm install --save node-melitk-otel
```

Import and initialize OpenTelemetry in your application:

```javascript
require('node-melitk-otel').OTel();
// OR
const { tracerProvider, meterProvider } = require('node-melitk-otel').OTel();
```

> **⚠️ Important:** `node-melitk-otel` must be imported and initialized in the first lines of your application code before importing other dependencies such as `express`, `RestClient`, or other libraries, as it needs to instrument them properly.

For more details, see the [SDK Documentation](https://furydocs.io/node-melitk-otel/latest/guide/#/).

## Contributing

We work hard to provide a high-quality and useful SDK for our Fury services, and we greatly value feedback and
contributions. Please review
our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/melisource/fury_node-toolkit/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) before
submitting any issues or pull requests to ensure we have all the necessary information to effectively respond to your
bug report or contribution.

## Contact Us!

Please use these community resources for getting help. We use the GitHub issues for tracking bugs and feature requests.

- Ask a question on [Meli Stackoverflow](https://meli.stackenterprise.co/questions/ask).
- Come join us on `#tech-observability` channel on [Slack](https://meli.enterprise.slack.com/archives/C02TXUEFT2M).
- Use the [**Fury Support**](https://web.furycloud.io/help-support?term=node+melitk+otel).
- If you think you may have found a bug, please open an [issue](https://github.com/melisource/fury_node-toolkit/issues).

This SDK implements Fury service APIs. For general issues regarding the Fury services and their guarantees, please
refer to the [Fury official documentation](https://furydocs.io/docs/guide/).

> Please don't hesitate to ask on the community channels! Your question will likely be useful for other people and help us to improve the existing documentation.
